---
title: "Marine_Project(Will_Rename_Later)"
output: html_document
---
```{r, echo = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r, echo = FALSE}
#Im doing a bit of work on figuring out how to upload datasets into this RScript. If we need to make a new .RMD, We could also do that.

#Think of this as a "Test" file

read.csv("cause_of_deaths.csv") -> death_dataset

read.csv("world_population.csv") -> pop_dataset

```
